title: Show Me The Time
description: Displays the current Minecraft time of the day.
body:
It was originally planned to be named "What Time Is It?", but I just found out this name is already taken, so here we are.

Anyways, this displays the current **Minecraft** time (not real world time) of the day just because.

You can configure the **scale**, choose between **12-hours** and **24-hours**, the **position** from 6 specific positions, and lastly the x and y **paddings**.

This mod is purely **client-side**, it does **not** do anything when installed on the server...hopefully.

## Configuration Commands
Type the prefix ```/showmethetime``` and choose from one of these:
- enabled
- scale
- timeConvention
- position
- paddings

The sub-commands are quite self-explainatory.

Scale ranges from **0~5x**, accepts **floating-point** numbers  
Paddings range from **0~100**, only accept **integers**
